  • Field Details

    • SOULS

      public static final Map<SoulTypes, Base_Soul> SOULS

    • canAbility

      public static boolean canAbility

  • Constructor Details

    • soulListener

      public soulListener()

  • Method Details

    • registerSouls

      public static void registerSouls()
      Registers all predefined soul-type instances to the SOULS map. Each soul type defined in the SoulTypes enumeration is associated with a corresponding instance of its specific implementation. This method is static and initializes the mapping of soul types to their respective implementations, such as Red, Green, and Blue, among others. The mapping includes both base variants (e.g., BaseRed, BaseGreen) and main variants of soul types. Once this method has been invoked, the SOULS map will contain all predefined relationship bindings between SoulTypes and their respective concrete implementations.

    • getSoul

      public static Base_Soul getSoul(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Retrieves the soul associated with the given player based on their persistent data. This method attempts to find the player's soul by querying the PersistentDataContainer of the provided Player object for a stored soul identifier. If a valid soul identifier is found, it is used to determine the corresponding soul instance from the predefined SOULS map. If no identifier is found or if it cannot be resolved to a valid soul, the method returns null.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose soul is to be retrieved; must not be null
      Returns:
      the Base_Soul instance associated with the player, or null if no valid soul is found for the player

    • Passive

      public void Passive(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Handles the passive abilities for a player if they are alive and have an associated soul. This method checks whether the provided player is alive using Life_and_Death.is_alive. If the player is alive, their associated soul is obtained via getSoul(Player). If a valid soul instance is found, the Passive method of the soul is invoked.
      Parameters:
      player - the player for whom the passive ability is executed; must not be null
